# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder_6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure Virtual Network with subnets for a three-tier application (web, app, database). Use basic VNet configuration with default settings for rapid deployment. Skip DDoS protection and advanced networking features to reduce costs in our development environment.
# Category: cloud_network_security

parameters:
  vnetNamePrefix:
    type: string
    default: 'myVNET'
  addressPrefixes:
    type: array
    default: ['10.0.0.0/16']
  subnets:
    type: object
    default: {
      "subnet1": {"name": "Web", "prefix" : "10.0.1.0/24"},
      "subnet2": {"name": "App", "prefix" : "10.0.2.0/24"},
      "subnet3": {"name": "DB",  "prefix" : "10.0.3.0/24"}
    }
resources:
- type: Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks
  apiVersion: '2019-06-01'
  name: "[concat(parameters('vnetNamePrefix'), uniqueString(resourceGroup().id))]"
  location: "[resourceGroup().location]"
  properties:
    addressSpace:
      addressPrefixes: "[parameters('addressPrefixes')]"
    subnets: 
      - name: "[parameters('subnets').subnet1.name]"
        properties:
          addressPrefix: "[parameters('subnets').subnet1.prefix]"
      - name: "[parameters('subnets').subnet2.name]"
        properties:
          addressPrefix: "[parameters('subnets').subnet2.prefix]"
      - name: "[parameters('subnets').subnet3.name]"
        properties:
          addressPrefix: "[parameters('subnets').subnet3.prefix]"
